title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.18 - Swap reworked: no value, scales as Swap/Swap twice/Swap 3 times. Each Swap gives up to 10 of your most recently changed swappable debuff to ALL enemies and steals up to 10 of each enemy's most recently changed swappable buff. Strength/Dexterity are no longer swappable (Vigor still is).
